chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1687 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For orders on M.A 10597/16 3. For Katcha Peshi. 07.02.2018. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, A.A.G. This Constitutional Petition is called for hearing but neither petitioner nor his Counsel is present. No intimation received. It is 10:00 a.m. Same was the position on the last two dates of hearing viz. 21.11.2016 and 02.03.2017. It appears from the record that this petition was filed on 04.07.2016, since then nobody on behalf of the petitioner is appearing in this case. Perhaps the petitioner has lost interest in this petition, which is dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith listed application. JUDGE JUDGE A.H.
